nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Jeroboam, how he made war and how he reigned, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Jeroboam, how he warred and how he reigned, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安其餘的事蹟，他怎樣爭戰，怎樣作王，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安其他的事，不论文治武功，都记在以色列的列王史上。
